title: Hello Kitty Bed
description: This Is a cool texture pack that changes the pink bed to a Hello Kitty bed
body:
HelloKittyHeaven is a Minecraft resource pack that simply changes pink beds into Hello Kitty beds. It would help me out if you wanted to try it out! This is my first ever mod so please show some soppurt by joining my discord below!

Made By ItzZyrq

Any isues join the discord below!
